title: Daman、Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Daman、Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Daman是Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu的一個城市，人口約200,000。A coastal union territory on the Arabian Sea, known for its Portuguese colonial heritage, beaches, and as a popular weekend getaway.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
